dashboard.name: Build a financial services dashboard for Volvo focused on th [AI Enhanced]

variables.input: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == "Volvo" | fields json.companyName | dedup json.companyName

fetch bizevents 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName
| fields json.journeyType | dedup json.journeyType
fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter json.companyName == "Volvo" | fields json.stepName | dedup json.stepName

fetch bizevents
| fields json.serviceName, json.companyName, json.journeyType
| summarize count(),by:{json.companyName, json.journeyType, json.serviceName}
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType)
| dedup json.serviceName
| fields json.serviceName = lower(json.serviceName)
| filter isNotNull(json.serviceName)

smartscapeNodes PROCESS
| lookup [smartscapeNodes SERVICE | fields id, name], sourceField:name, lookupField:name, prefix:"svc."
| lookup [timeseries cpu = avg(dt.process.cpu.usage), by:{dt.smartscape.process}], sourceField:id, lookupField:dt.smartscape.process, fields:{cpu}
| filter isNotNull(cpu)
| fieldsAdd LowerService = lower(name)
| filter in(LowerService, $Service)
| fields id
| dedup id

0.content:
# Build a financial services dashboard for Volvo focused on th
## Volvo | Subscription Flow Journey | Business Observability
**Data Signals:** 🔧 Services
---

3.title: Loan Approval Rates
3.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize total = count(), successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false) | fieldsAdd rate = round((toDouble(successful) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:1)

4.title: Overdraft Utilization
4.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize total = count(), successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false) | fieldsAdd rate = round((toDouble(successful) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:1)

5.title: Regulatory Compliance Scores
5.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize total = count(), successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false) | fieldsAdd rate = round((toDouble(successful) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:1)

6.content:
---
🤖 *Dashboard generated by Bespoke AI (3 Ollama tiles + 6 sections, Grail field data) | 2026-05-06 | 6 tiles*
